title: Nenjankuzhi Lyrics Naveena Saraswathi Sabatham Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song : Nenjankuzhi
Singers: Karthik, Pooja Vaidyanath
Lyrics : Vairamuthu
Movie: Naveena Saraswathi Sabatham
Music: Prem Kumar

Nenjankuzhi yengudhadi
nethi pottu veengudhadi
nithiraya thozhacha kannu
thudikudhadi.

Unnenappu ongudhadi
Ullusuru nogudhadi.
kanneer pattu kannam rendum
valikudhadi.

Unna vittu naan pirinjaa
vazhaka athu pogum - azhage
kanna vittu nee maranjaa
paarva sethu pogum.

NItham unna enni enni
neram vathi pogum- adiye
Suttu viral neendu neendu
dhooram sethu pogum.

Adi unna unna nenachi
en usura kayil pudichu.
naan nondhu vendhu kedaken
siru noolaampadayaa elachi. (Nenjankuzhi...)

Adikkura kaatha niruthi
vaaya pudunga paarpa.
vanna vanna siru paravaiga pola
unna pathi ketpa.

Adi angae engo nadakka
adi ingae ennilam thudikka
ne mannil kanneer vadikka
adhu vinnai sendru nanaikka
nee thaeda, naan vaada.

Adi unna unna nenachi
en usura kayil pudichu.
naan nondhu vendhu kedaken
siru noolaampadayaa elachi.

Nenjankuzhi yengum yengum
nethi pottu veengi pogum.
nithiraya thozhacha kannu
thudithudikkum.

Kannukulla un mugamdhaaya
vandhu vandhu pogum.
nenju patta paadu saamiku sonnaa
baaram konjam theerum.

Un aasaya nenjil alikka
naan amilam oothi kudikka.
un ninaivai eppai marakka
vaan neelathai edhai kondu alikka.
nee vaada, naan thaeda ..

En ninaivai ellaam koluthi
adhai ellaa dhisaiyilum seluthi.
naan uyirodu ulladhai unnarthi
uyir neetpen unnai malarthi.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Nenjankuzhi?

The song Nenjankuzhi explores themes of love and emotional connection, expressing the feelings of longing and affection between lovers.

What is the plot context of the movie Naveena Saraswathi Sabatham?

Naveena Saraswathi Sabatham revolves around a unique blend of romance and fantasy, showcasing the journey of its characters as they navigate love and relationships.

Who are the singers of Nenjankuzhi?

The song is beautifully sung by Karthik and Pooja Vaidyanath, whose voices complement each other perfectly.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Nenjankuzhi was composed by Prem Kumar, known for his melodious tunes and captivating compositions.

When was Nenjankuzhi released?

Nenjankuzhi was released on November 29, 2013, as part of the movie Naveena Saraswathi Sabatham.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nenjankuzhi, the characters express their deep emotional connection through heartfelt lyrics and melodious tunes. The song encapsulates the essence of love, portraying the bittersweet feelings of longing and affection. Set against the backdrop of Naveena Saraswathi Sabatham, it enhances the romantic narrative of the film. The collaboration of Karthik and Pooja Vaidyanath brings a unique charm, making it a memorable listening experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nenjankuzhi from the film Naveena Saraswathi Sabatham is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Karthik and Pooja Vaidyanath, this song weaves a tale of emotional depth and romantic nostalgia. The lyrical brilliance of Vairamuthu combined with Prem Kumar's soulful composition makes this track a must-listen for every romantic at heart.
stanzaMeanings: The heart's treasure is where it belongs, and it will wander off, making the eyes sleepy.
Your presence is in my heart, and it brings pain. Tears flow from both eyes.
If I leave you, I will lose my way, and beauty will fade away if you forget to look.
Every moment, I think of you, and my fingers stretch out to reach you from afar.
I hold you in my heart, and I want to catch you. I will seek a small thread of hope.
The sound of your name will echo in my ears. Like colorful little birds, I will think of you.
Here and there, I will walk, and in my heart, tears will flow. You should seek the stars and I will sing.
I hold you in my heart, and I want to catch you. I will seek a small thread of hope.
The heart's treasure is everywhere, and it will wander off. The eyes will feel sleepy.
Your face comes and goes in my eyes. If I sing a song from my heart, the burden will lessen.
I will blow away your desires and drink the nectar. I will never forget your thoughts.
I will pour out all my thoughts and spread them in every direction. I will awaken my soul and nurture you.
